name: Drake

acts.description: Documented texting relationship with Millie Bobby Brown beginning when she was around 14; Instagram DMs surfaced

behavior_summary: Millie Bobby Brown described texting relationship with Drake starting young. Screenshots and public statements point to a pattern of messaging underage female celebrities. No charges.

art.summary: One of the most commercially successful artists of the streaming era. Defined a decade of pop-influenced hip-hop.

verdict.blurb: The most streamed artist on Spotify has a documented habit of initiating text relationships with underage girls and then releasing songs about them when they grow up. That's not romantic. That's a pattern.
